default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the pipeline for renewals, conversions, and new sales.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Sunbit Renewal:** A custom website build ($20k setup + $15k/mo) will be handled by the Sprint team (George & Hassan). This provides a template for a new playbook, but requires managing George's capacity, as his Brex client consumes 3x the effort of a standard client.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [**Ramp Conversion:** The deal is at risk. The strategy is to demo Brex's success to Ramp's decision-maker (George, Growth) on March 12, just two weeks before the opt-out deadline. This meeting is not yet scheduled and requires immediate follow-up.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Sales Pipeline:** Tyler is pushing to close Vercel and Otter this week. Vercel has a 5 PM PST signing deadline today, while Otter is delayed by minor contract requests (e.g., logo rights, quarterly billing).](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [**Process Improvements:** Two initiatives will boost sales efficiency: a formal referral program (Bridget) and a "hygiene dashboard" (Leah) to flag stuck deals and automate daily activity digests for Tyler.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)

## Topics

### Renewals

  - [**Sunbit:** Agreement sent. This custom website build ($20k setup + $15k/mo) will be handled by the Sprint team to create a playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [**Team:** George & Hassan (replicates successful CashflowDesk project).](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [**Challenge:** George is at capacity (Ramp, Brex, Daylight, Vercel). Brex consumes 3x the effort of a standard client, blocking new work.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
      - [**Action:** William & Andi to manage George's workload, prioritizing new Sprint clients over the Brex account.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Webflow:** Flat renewal agreement sent. Awaiting procurement review; no issues expected.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [**Alex:** At risk. A content backlog from a previous ME's inactivity means no results to present for renewal. The team must catch up this week to prepare for Marcel's call next week.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### Conversions

  - [**Turnstile:** Green. Quality issues with Ife's work are resolved. Sydney now reviews all content, and a new pod editor, Jen, will take over editing.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [**NetRix:** Green, but a demanding client.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Meetings involve \~9 people with conflicting priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
      - [**Mitigation:** The CMO is highly engaged, signaling strong buy-in.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [**Handover:** Andi will assign to Joe, who is a good fit for complex accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [**Ramp:** Yellow. The deal is at risk due to a lack of buy-in from the primary decision-maker (George, Growth).](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Demo Brex's success to George, Growth, on March 12.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [**Risk:** The meeting is not scheduled, and George, Growth, has a history of unreliability.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
      - [**Handover:** Andi will assign to Joe, as Ramp is a direct competitor to Brex, Navon, and Engine.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### Sales Pipeline

  - [**Vercel:** Signing deadline is today, 5 PM PST. If missed, the deal will be pushed to March 2.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [**Knox:** Kickoff moved to Friday, March 6, to avoid their sales kickoff (March 2–4).](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
  - [**Otter:** Expected to sign today or tomorrow. Minor contract requests (logo rights, quarterly billing) are delaying the close.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [**Binti & Nerdio:** Binti is achievable this week; Nerdio is targeted for early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [**Content Complexity Analysis:** Panzer's Time Doctor data shows a 43x gap in editing time between the simplest and most complex accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [**Drivers:** Rigorous fact-checking, high legal exposure, and technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Insight:** This confirms that strict adherence to the ICP for technical clients is critical to prevent unsustainable workloads.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [**Sales Efficiency Initiatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
      - [**Referral Program:** Bridget will create a formal referral agreement this week for partners like Gonto and Carrie Lou.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
      - [**Hygiene Dashboard:** Leah will build a dashboard to flag stuck deals and automate daily activity digests for Tyler.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
      - [**Phase One Skip:** Tyler will propose a model where clients sign a 12-month contract and complete Phase One at the start, accelerating deal velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/ZX8UvTSN-MM65z6nTxgvgx4q6zRbcysW?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
